# `takeSnapshot`

Take a snapshot of the current page and save it under the provided screen name.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.toolcalls.commands.TakeSnapshotTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `screenName` — `String`
  Name for the screen being captured (e.g., 'login_screen', 'payment_confirmation').

### Optional parameters

- `description` — `String`
  Optional description of what this snapshot captures or why it was taken.

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)

Typed result schemas (`kind: query | action`, MCP `structuredContent`) are not yet carried by the resolved manifest — this section will gain detail when that lands.
